blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt go for history in Lisbon on a monster Champions League night

Perfectly balanced on aggregate in Lisbon — Bodo/Glimt are 90 minutes from a quarter-final. Norwegian football's biggest European night in a generation, while Haaland faces Real Madrid at the same time.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Wednesday
items: ⚽ Barcelona vs Newcastle United 18:45 — level on aggregate, winner-takes-all at Camp Nou
⚽ Liverpool vs Galatasaray 21:00 — trail 1-0, need Anfield European comeback magic
